name: Green Chili and Tortilla Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Place tortillas in the oil for 15 seconds on each side to soften; set aside.
3. Pour off oil and brown meat with seasonings over medium heat.
4. Tear 4 tortillas into pieces and layer them in a casserole dish.
5. Cover with a quarter of the meat, soup, chopped onions, chilies, olives, and cheese. Repeat layers, ending with cheese on top.
6. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit until bubbling.
